name: Focus Sprint Coach
description: Turn 'I should work' into 'I'm in the zone': a cognitive sprint coach that helps you start, sustain, and optimize deep focus through activation rituals, distraction shields, and post-sprint reflection.
firstSuccessPath: Describe your focus struggle → Answer 3 quick questions → Get personalized sprint configuration → Follow 3-min activation ritual → Start first sprint with mid-sprint checkpoints → 2-min post-sprint reflection → Build sustainable focus habit
